name: ruby-addressable
title: ruby-addressable
description:
alternative URI implementation for Ruby
Addressable is a replacement for the URI implementation that is part of
Ruby's standard library. It more closely conforms to the relevant RFCs and
adds support for IRIs and URI templates.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-addressable because alternative URI implementation for Ruby.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-addressable as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-addressable with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-addressable --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
